# Milpa

> Milpa doesn't promise to save you from thinking. Milpa promises to teach you to think while you build.

Milpa is a PHP framework whose distinguishing trait is that it opens pluggable pipelines through clear contracts for humans and agents: one operation is declared once (the Command-as-atom) and projected to the CLI, MCP and HTTP surfaces without being rewritten.

## Pages

- [Milpa Academy](https://academy.milpa.lat/en/): The curriculum home: learning tracks, verifiable labs, and architecture artifacts.
- [The atom and its doors](https://academy.milpa.lat/en/atomo/): Artifact 09: the same handler, projected through three doors, with its guarantees per surface.
- [Milpa Academy · Architecture artifacts](https://academy.milpa.lat/en/artifacts/): The full gallery: the 11 interactive architecture artifacts, from the webinar to engineering inspection.
- [Labs · Milpa Academy](https://academy.milpa.lat/en/labs/): Four verifiable practices: boot a host, break and repair a contract, generate a route and activate the agent-ready surface.

## Learn

- [Learn](https://academy.milpa.lat/en/learn/): Choose a track. Each unit connects a short explanation, an artifact, a hands-on practice, and a graded assessment with the primary source.
- [The metaphor is the design](https://academy.milpa.lat/en/learn/fundamentos/sistema-vivo/): Fundamentals
- [Contracts before coupling](https://academy.milpa.lat/en/learn/fundamentos/contratos-grafo/): Fundamentals
- [A version is a contract](https://academy.milpa.lat/en/learn/fundamentos/version-contrato/): Fundamentals
- [One action, explicit policies](https://academy.milpa.lat/en/learn/fundamentos/pipeline-gates/): Fundamentals
- [Boot a verifiable host](https://academy.milpa.lat/en/learn/construye/skeleton-boot/): Build with Milpa
- [Create a capability and a route](https://academy.milpa.lat/en/learn/construye/plugin-request/): Build with Milpa
- [Enable tools for agents](https://academy.milpa.lat/en/learn/construye/agent-tools/): Build with Milpa
- [Compose with @milpa/design](https://academy.milpa.lat/en/learn/construye/consume-design/): Build with Milpa
- [Atlas of boundaries](https://academy.milpa.lat/en/learn/arquitectura/atlas-limites/): Auditable architecture
- [X-ray of the runtime](https://academy.milpa.lat/en/learn/arquitectura/runtime-boot/): Auditable architecture
- [Surfaces and their doors](https://academy.milpa.lat/en/learn/arquitectura/superficies-puertas/): Auditable architecture
- [Visible legacy and the migration plan](https://academy.milpa.lat/en/learn/arquitectura/legacy-y-migracion/): Auditable architecture
- [Booting with warnings: accepted risks](https://academy.milpa.lat/en/learn/arquitectura/riesgos-aceptados/): Auditable architecture
- [The process is the log](https://academy.milpa.lat/en/learn/arquitectura/estado-log/): Auditable architecture
- [The visual contract is executable](https://academy.milpa.lat/en/learn/arquitectura/contrato-ejecutable/): Auditable architecture
- [The plan before the disk](https://academy.milpa.lat/en/learn/arquitectura/plan-disco/): Auditable architecture
- [The tool pipeline, made inspectable](https://academy.milpa.lat/en/learn/arquitectura/plan-invocacion/): Auditable architecture
- [The six layers](https://academy.milpa.lat/en/learn/disena/capas-visuales/): Design with Milpa
- [Design gives language; Academy gives behavior](https://academy.milpa.lat/en/learn/disena/composicion-app/): Design with Milpa
- [From local candidate to public pattern](https://academy.milpa.lat/en/learn/disena/promocion-patron/): Design with Milpa
